_README: Where the vendored CRD schemas in this directory come from. The files are byte-identical copies of the controller-gen output in nanohype/eks-agent-platform at `upstream.ref` — never hand-edit them. `sha256` is verified by scripts/validate-platform-manifests.mjs before any schema is parsed, and `npm run schemas:check` re-verifies the digests and matches the bytes against upstream at that same ref. `npm run schemas:sync -- --ref=<sha>` moves the pin and rewrites the digests together. See README.md in this directory.
